display.name: Rovastar & Unchained - Ambrosia Mystic (Dark Heart Mix)
display.author: Rovastar & Unchained

annotation.technical_notes: A central custom_wave oscillates with high-frequency jitter driven by the treble of the test signal, while bilateral and radial domain_repetition mirrors the visual field into a Rorschach-like structure. Per-pixel warp equations combined with frame feedback via sampler_main produce fluid, smoke-like organic trails that decay slowly. Sudden color shifts and scale expansions are gated to the bass transients of the synthetic test signal, cycling through magenta, cyan, and monochrome phases.
